name: huoda-uniapp
description: 活达校园平台 uni-app 前端

scripts.dev:h5: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. vue-cli-service uni-serve --platform h5
scripts.build:h5: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. vue-cli-service uni-build --platform h5
scripts.dev:mp-weixin: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. vue-cli-service uni-serve --platform mp-weixin
scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. vue-cli-service uni-build --platform mp-weixin
